title: stenostomum abbreviatum subsp. moaensis
intro: Stenostomum abbreviatum subsp. moaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Cuba. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Stenostomum abbreviatum subsp. moaensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
